login.title: Welcome Back
login.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.subtitle: Start with 15 free credits — no credit card required
signup.free_credits: You'll receive 15 free credits on signup
signup.terms_notice: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

verify.title: Verify Your Email
verify.description: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.
verify.skip_note: Some features will be limited until you verify your email.
verify.already_verified: Email already verified. You can now use all features.

password_reset.title: Reset Password
password_reset.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
password_reset.success: Reset link sent! Check your email.
password_reset.error_token_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

billing.title: Billing & Plans
billing.starter_description: 200 credits per month — renews at 1,500 DZD/mo
billing.failed_renewal: Payment failed. Update your payment method.

status.timeout: Payment received — credits will post shortly

cancel.title: Cancel Subscription
cancel.description: Your credits remain usable until the end of the billing period. No refunds.

dzone.title: Danger Zone
dzone.delete_description: Permanently delete your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.

locale.inferred: We detected your language as {locale}. Is this correct?

states.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
states.rate_limited: You have reached the daily limit. Please try again tomorrow.
states.maintenance: We are performing maintenance. Back shortly.

errors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
errors.invalid_password: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action

hero.title: Find B2B Leads in Algeria
hero.subtitle: Access verified contacts from Algerian companies — importers, distributors, and decision-makers across 58 wilayas.

trust.label: Trusted by hundreds of Algerian businesses

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1: Search by industry, wilaya, or keyword
how_it_works.step3: Export your leads to CSV or Excel

founder.text: I built dzLeadsFinder because I saw how hard it is for Algerian businesses to find qualified leads. We combine multiple data sources to give you accurate, up-to-date contact information — so you can focus on growing your business.

search.title: Search Leads
search.placeholder: Search by name, activity, or keyword...

results.count_with_limit: Showing first {shown} of {total} results — refine your search
results.empty: No leads match your filters. Try widening your criteria.
results.truncated: Refine your search — only the first 1,000 results are shown
results.refine_prompt: Add more filters to narrow results

saved.title: Saved Searches
saved.max_capacity: You have reached the saved search limit

how_we_verify.title: How We Verify
how_we_verify.description: We combine multiple data sources to provide accurate, up-to-date contact information for Algerian businesses.

sources.title: Data Sources
sources.google_places: Google Places API — public business listings
sources.pages_jaunes: Pages Jaunes Algérie — yellow pages directory
sources.note: We do NOT source data from social media, private databases, or unauthorized sources.

how_we_verify.updates: Every record is verified at least once every 30 days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: We take your data privacy seriously. dzLeadsFinder complies with Algerian Law 18-07 on the Protection of Personal Data.

rights.access: You have the right to access your personal data
rights.rectification: You have the right to correct inaccurate data
rights.deletion: You have the right to request deletion of your data
rights.portability: You have the right to data portability

privacy.data_collected: We collect only the data necessary to provide our service: email, name, and payment information.
privacy.contact: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at privacy@dzleadsfinder.dz

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: By using dzLeadsFinder, you agree to these terms. Our service is intended for B2B lead generation purposes only.
terms.subscription: Subscriptions renew automatically. You may cancel at any time.
terms.refund: All purchases are non-refundable as per our refund policy.
terms.usage: You may not scrape, resell, or redistribute data obtained through dzLeadsFinder.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.description: All purchases on dzLeadsFinder are non-refundable by default. This includes subscription fees and credit pack purchases.
refund.exception: Exceptions may be made in cases of proven technical errors on our part. Contact support@dzleadsfinder.dz for assistance.
